metadata.archetype_justification: Pure npm testing utility library that exports functions for mocking AWS SDK services. No persistent state, no HTTP/RPC surface, no database connections, no write operations, no deployed infrastructure.
metadata.context: Mock library for the AWS SDK, used in JS/TS test suites.

evaluations.title: Documented API Interface
evaluations.reasoning: Testing utility library that exports JavaScript/TypeScript functions. No HTTP/RPC/GraphQL API. Interface documented in README.md and typed via TypeScript declarations.

evaluations.title: Machine-Readable API Specification
evaluations.reasoning: No HTTP/RPC surface — machine-readable spec is not applicable. Library API contracts expressed via TypeScript type declarations.

evaluations.title: Structured Error Responses
evaluations.reasoning: No HTTP/RPC surface — structured error responses are not applicable. Library communicates failures via thrown JavaScript Errors.

evaluations.title: Idempotent Write Operations
evaluations.reasoning: agent_scope is read-only. Additionally, no write operations exist in this library.

evaluations.title: Structured Response Format
evaluations.reasoning: Extended question — always evaluated as INFO but dev-library-application override applied.

evaluations.title: Asynchronous Operation Support
evaluations.reasoning: No operations >30s or long-running workflows.

evaluations.title: Event Emission for State Changes
evaluations.reasoning: No state changes — stateless-utility archetype.

evaluations.title: Rate Limit Documentation and Headers
evaluations.reasoning: Extended question — dev-library-application override applied.

evaluations.title: Machine Identity Authentication
evaluations.reasoning: System does not issue or enforce agent identities. Testing utility library with no authentication surface.

evaluations.title: Scoped Permissions (Least Privilege)
evaluations.reasoning: Dev-library-application with has_auth_surface=false — no permissions surface to evaluate.

evaluations.title: Action-Level Authorization
evaluations.reasoning: Dev-library-application with has_auth_surface=false.

evaluations.title: Identity Propagation and Delegation
evaluations.reasoning: Archetype calibration downgrade for stateless-utility combined with dev-library-application override.

evaluations.title: Credential Management
evaluations.reasoning: No credentials managed by library. CODECOV_TOKEN in CI is a GitHub secret.

evaluations.title: Immutable Audit Logging
evaluations.reasoning: agent_scope is read-only. has_auth_surface=false AND has_write_operations=false. Audit logging is a consumer responsibility.

evaluations.title: Agent Identity Suspension
evaluations.reasoning: System does not issue or enforce agent identities — suspension is a consumer responsibility. has_auth_surface=false.

evaluations.title: Compensation and Rollback
evaluations.reasoning: agent_scope is read-only. has_write_operations=false, has_http_rpc_surface=false. Stateless-utility archetype. All mock operations reversible via AWS.restore().

evaluations.title: Queryable Current State
evaluations.reasoning: No persistent state — stateless-utility archetype.

evaluations.title: Concurrency Controls
evaluations.reasoning: agent_scope is read-only AND no persistent state.

evaluations.title: Circuit Breakers and Resilience
evaluations.reasoning: No external dependencies — library makes no outbound calls.

evaluations.title: Rate Limiting and Throttling
evaluations.reasoning: No HTTP/RPC surface — API-layer rate limiting is not applicable. Stateless-utility archetype.

evaluations.title: Blast Radius and Transaction Limits
evaluations.reasoning: agent_scope is read-only.

evaluations.title: Infrastructure Capacity for Agent Traffic
evaluations.reasoning: Service is P2 priority, not P0, and not on the critical path.

evaluations.title: Draft/Pending State
evaluations.reasoning: agent_scope is read-only.

evaluations.title: Configurable Approval Gates
evaluations.reasoning: agent_scope is read-only.

evaluations.title: Sandbox/Staging Environment
evaluations.reasoning: Library/utility — no HTTP/RPC surface and no persistent data store. Test suite with 100% line coverage serves as staging.

evaluations.title: Sensitive Data Classification
evaluations.reasoning: Not a data-handling target. Stage A = No. SDK mock library never touches real user data. Dev-library-application override also applies.

evaluations.title: Data Residency and Sovereignty
evaluations.reasoning: agent_scope is read-only. has_persistent_data_store=false, has_logging_of_user_data=false. Stateless-utility archetype.

evaluations.title: Selective Query Support
evaluations.reasoning: No list/query endpoints with potentially unbounded results.

evaluations.title: System of Record Designations
evaluations.reasoning: No persistent state — stateless-utility archetype.

evaluations.title: Temporal Metadata and Freshness
evaluations.reasoning: No persistent state — stateless-utility archetype.

evaluations.title: PII Redaction in Logs
evaluations.reasoning: System does not log user data and holds no user data. Only logging is console.log with service name strings.

evaluations.title: Data Quality Awareness
evaluations.reasoning: Extended question — dev-library-application override applied.

evaluations.title: Schema Versioning and API Contracts
evaluations.reasoning: Dev-library-application override applied. Library uses semver versioning and TypeScript declarations.

evaluations.title: Semantically Meaningful Field Names
evaluations.reasoning: Extended question — dev-library-application override applied.

evaluations.title: Data Catalog / Metadata Layer
evaluations.reasoning: Extended question — dev-library-application override applied.

evaluations.title: Distributed Tracing and Structured Logging
evaluations.reasoning: Library/utility — tracing and correlation are consumer concerns. No HTTP/RPC surface and no agent-initiated request path to trace.

evaluations.title: Alerting on Error Rates and Latency
evaluations.reasoning: Library/utility — alerting is a consumer concern. No HTTP/RPC surface.

evaluations.title: Business Outcome Metrics
evaluations.reasoning: Extended question — dev-library-application override applied.

evaluations.title: Infrastructure Governance for Agent-Facing Surface
evaluations.reasoning: Library repository (dev-library-application override). ENG-Q1 through ENG-Q5 are N/A per library N/A mapping.

evaluations.title: CI/CD with API Contract Testing
evaluations.reasoning: Library repository (dev-library-application override).

evaluations.title: Rollback Capability
evaluations.reasoning: Library repository (dev-library-application override).

evaluations.title: API Test Coverage
evaluations.reasoning: Library repository (dev-library-application override).

evaluations.title: Encryption at Rest for Agent-Accessible Data
evaluations.reasoning: Library repository (dev-library-application override).
